message.content: The sky transitions from deep purple at the top to lighter purple near the horizon, dotted with tiny stars. A crescent moon (half-lit, half-dark) sits in the upper left. The mosque silhouette features a large central dome, two smaller domes, and two tall minarets, all in solid black. There’s no visible text/watermark, and the dark lower portion (landscape) offers ample space for white text overlay.
